news.headline: 2025-2030 Dietary Guidelines to prioritize plant-based protein over animal protein; Doctors approve.
news.summary: A recent development in Washington saw the advisory committee responsible for providing scientific guidance on updating the Dietary Guidelines for Americans suggest significant changes for the 2025-2030 revision. It is the first time such a recommendation has been made. The committee advised for the inclusion of more nutrient-dense plant-based meals and dietary options in the upcoming guidelines. They proposed giving priority to plant-based proteins over animal proteins and emphasized the numerous benefits of beans, peas, and lentils as sources of protein. This recommendation comes from the Dietary Guidelines Advisory Committee (DGAC), and signals a potential shift towards more plant-centric dietary recommendations.

news.headline: Trump promises quick approval for investors putting $1B into America.
Karolinska Development sells 4.6 million shares in OssDsign, keeping 5 million; boosts liquidity.
news.summary: In Stockholm, Sweden, as of December 10, 2024, Karolinska Development AB (listed on Nasdaq Stockholm as KDEV) has sold 4.6 million shares in its portfolio firm OssDsign, boosting the investment company's liquidity. Following the divestment, Karolinska Development retains approximately 5 million shares in OssDsign.

news.headline: Nevada enhances blockchain security after fake electors incident, amid the 2024 presidential race aftermath.
news.summary: The timing of the announcement is significant, coming just one month after the conclusion of the 2024 US presidential race.

news.headline: Semiconductor fabrication software market to grow by $984.91 million (2024-2028) due to increased design complexity, AI impact.
news.summary: A recent report analyzing the influence of AI on market trends reveals that the global semiconductor fabrication software market is projected to increase by approximately USD 984.91 million between 2024 and 2028. The market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of nearly 2.77% during this period.

news.headline: Sycamore Partners in discussions to buy Walgreens; deal involves estimated $70 billion.
HII appoints Jennifer Childs as VP of Quality and Engineering at Ingalls Shipbuilding, starting Jan 6, 2025. Blanchette to lead HII and Ingalls.
news.summary: In Pascagoula, Mississippi, on December 10, 2024, HII revealed that Jennifer Childs is set to become the new vice president of quality and engineering for the Ingalls Shipbuilding division starting January 6, 2025. Childs will take over from Brian Blanchette, who is transitioning to become the vice president of HII and president of Ingalls Shipbuilding.

news.headline: Tevogen Bio to attend 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference; CEO to represent company in San Francisco.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Tevogen Bio Holdings Inc., a Nasdaq-listed company under the ticker symbol TVGN, based in Warren, New Jersey, disclosed that its Founder and CEO, Ryan Saadi, MD, MPH, is set to participate in the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference scheduled for January 13-16, 2025, in San Francisco, California. Tevogen Bio focuses on developing genetically unmodified T cell therapeutics for treating infectious diseases and cancer, operating as a clinical-stage specialty immunotherapy biotech firm.

news.headline: Theratechnologies' tesamorelin update has a PDUFA goal date of March 25, 2025, submitted on Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, a biopharmaceutical company called Theratechnologies Inc. revealed that the United States Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has set a goal date of March 25, 2025, under the Prescription Drug User Fee Act (PDUFA). This date applies to their supplemental Biologics License Application for the F8 formulation of tesamorelin. Theratechnologies is listed on both the TSX (TH) and NASDAQ (THTX) and specializes in developing and commercializing innovative therapies. This announcement marks a significant step in the regulatory process for the company, as it awaits a decision from the FDA regarding the application.

news.headline: Nokia Corp buys back shares on 10.12.2024.
Atos SE finalizes €233 million rights issue. No distribution in US, Canada, Australia, or Japan. Advertisement, not prospectus.
news.summary: This press release is not intended for distribution in or into the United States, Canada, Australia, or Japan. It should be noted that this is an advertisement and not a prospectus as defined by Regulation (EU) 2017/1129 of the European Parliament and the Council dated June 14, 2017.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency market sees losses:Bitcoin: $96,035.77 (-0.97%)Ethereum: $3,639.93 (-3.9%)Dogecoin: $0.3882 (-9.6%)Bulls hopeful with increased large transactions and active addresses; 583,986 traders liquidated, losing $1.76B.Various notable developments.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are in a correction phase with Bitcoin trading at $96,035.77 (-0.97%), Ethereum at $3,639.93 (-3.9%), Solana at $212.60 (-4%), Dogecoin at $0.3882 (-9.6%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00002583 (-11.5%). Notable statistics reveal a 116% increase in large transactions, with daily active addresses growing by 6.8%. Transactions over $100,000 shot up from 9,044 to 13,121 in a day, while exchanges' netflows saw a 152.3% decrease. Additionally, 583,986 traders were liquidated in the past day, totaling $1.76 billion. Important developments include discussions around a US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, Microsoft and Amazon investors eyeing Bitcoin investments, Riot Platforms aiming to raise $525 million for Bitcoin purchases, and Michael Saylor advocating for replacing gold with Bitcoin. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trump may welcome $150,000 Bitcoin in presidency, focus on boosting cryptocurrency-friendly regulations.
news.summary: Donald Trump's potential return to the White House has raised hopes for a shift towards cryptocurrency-friendly policies. Recent reports suggest that Trump, known for his promise of a "golden age of America," is looking to enhance market metrics, with a specific focus on cryptocurrencies. Axios revealed that Trump has even claimed credit for Bitcoin's surge past the $100,000 mark, humorously stating "You're welcome." Insider sources suggest that Trump may prioritize implementing regulations favorable to the crypto industry, a move exemplified by his selection of Paul Atkins, a known crypto advocate, for a key role. This development signals a potential shift in policy under Trump's leadership.

news.headline: Violence prevention pioneer Erica Ford celebrates 37th work anniversary, releases a playbook for cultivating peace.Character count: 104
news.summary: In New York on December 10, 2024, well-known human rights advocate and expert on violence prevention, Erica Ford, released The Peace Doctor's Playbook: 365 Days to a Stronger, More Powerful You in response to rising mental health issues and social divides. This comprehensive manual provides crucial strategies for personal empowerment and growth over a course of 365 days.

news.headline: Costco Teamsters in Long Beach rally for fair contract, protesting unfair labor practices. Hundred workers demand fair treatment.
news.summary: In Long Beach, California on December 10, 2024, numerous Costco Teamsters gathered for a demonstration against unfair labor practices, calling for a fair contract. The protest was led by Teamsters General President Sean M. O'Brien and General Secretary-Treasurer Fred Zuckerman.Approximately hundreds of workers participated in the rally to advocate for better working conditions and equitable treatment.

news.headline: JPMorgan increases price targets on mining stocks related to Bitcoin. #Finance #Bitcoin #JPMorgan #Stocks
news.summary: In a recent report, it was stated that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, which is the lowest it has been in the past 10 years. This significant decrease translates to over 1 million jobs being added to the economy in the last quarter alone. Additionally, the stock market has seen a 10% increase in the same period, reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts are optimistic about the future economic growth, attributing it to various government initiatives and increased consumer spending.

news.headline: NY regulator greenlights Ripple stablecoin RLUSD, says CEO Brad Garlinghouse. Listing to go live on exchanges shortly.
news.summary: The CEO of Ripple announced that the RLUSD listing will be available on exchanges shortly after receiving approval from the New York Department of Financial Services for the stablecoin.

news.headline: HitPaw releases VikPea V4.0.0 with new AI Color module, including SDR to HDR feature.
news.summary: In New York on December 10, 2024, HitPaw, a prominent software company, unveiled the latest version of HitPaw VikPea (formerly known as HitPaw Video Enhancer). The newly introduced HitPaw VikPea V4.0.0 showcases the addition of the AI Color module, featuring the widely favored SDR to HDR capability.

news.headline: Omnia Exterior Solutions partners with James & Whitney Co. to expand into New England, marking its 11th acquisition since May 2023.
news.summary: Omnia Exterior Solutions has announced a partnership with James & Whitney Co. to launch their expansion into New England. This move represents their 11th acquisition made by the company since May 2023.

news.headline: CEO plans to test obesity drugs on addiction; Lilly to conduct study. #pharma #news
NASA to discuss Firefly's Moon flight with media on Dec. 17 at 1 p.m. EST, focusing on science/tech delivered to Moon via CLPS.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, NASA announced a media teleconference scheduled for 1 p.m. EST on December 17. The conference aims to discuss the agency's science and technology included in Firefly Aerospace's inaugural Moon shipment under the NASA's CLPS program. This milestone represents a significant advancement in lunar exploration, demonstrating collaboration between NASA and commercial space entities. The event signifies a crucial step in furthering space exploration efforts, highlighting the importance of partnerships in advancing scientific research and technology.

news.headline: Southern Copper receives upgrade in IBD Relative Strength Rating, signaling positive price performance and potential economic boost.
news.summary: Southern Copper has experienced an increase in its price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. This positive development has garnered attention as it may reflect a promising outlook for the economy.

news.headline: CarMax stock gains RS Rating upgrade due to improving price performance. - Investor's Business Daily
news.summary: CarMax has demonstrated enhanced price performance, resulting in an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating. This upgrade reflects the improved stock performance of CarMax.

news.headline: Assumption University reappoints President Greg Weiner, Ph.D., for a 5-year term until May 2030. Confidence in his leadership shown.
news.summary: In Worcester, Massachusetts on December 10, 2024, the Board of Trustees of Assumption University has confirmed the reappointment of President Greg Weiner, Ph.D., for an extended term of five years until May 2030. The Board's decision signifies strong support for Weiner's leadership abilities and marks a key development for the university.

news.headline: Replay Sports Cards to expand to Denver, attending card show Dec. 13-15, promoting franchise opportunity and charity initiative.
news.summary: A sports card franchise will be making its debut appearance at the Denver Card Show from December 13-15, 2024. This event will serve as a platform for the franchise to promote its unique business opportunities. Along with facilitating the buying, selling, and trading of cards, the franchise will also be collecting donations for its Replay Gives Back Initiative. This venture by Replay Sports Cards marks the first of its kind in the nation, showcasing its commitment to both the sports card market and community support. The event is set to attract a significant number of attendees and participants eager to engage in the various activities offered by the franchise.

news.headline: Wednesday FX Option Expiries
U.S. Data Agency attributes mistakes to outdated technology and other failures in report on data release mishaps.
news.summary: The Bureau of Labor Statistics, responsible for monitoring employment and inflation rates, released a report addressing errors in data release that led to embarrassing incidents.

news.headline: Phixey launches public stock offering through StartEngine to disrupt $24 billion phone protection industry.
news.summary: Phixey, a renowned device repair and protection company, has revealed the initiation of a public offering for its security via StartEngine on December 10, 2024. This significant development will enable the company to expedite its innovative advancements within the industry, aiming to further disrupt the $24 billion sector.

news.headline: Options Medical Weight Loss expands to Philadelphia, with new clinics in Collegeville and Malvern. Entry into PA market. (Characters: 120)
news.summary: In a recent development on December 10, 2024, Options Medical Weight Loss, the leading medical weight loss clinic in the country, has entered the Pennsylvania market. This expansion into the Philadelphia Metro area includes the establishment of new locations in Collegeville and Malvern. This move signals the company's strategic growth plan, marking its presence in a key region with significant market potential.

news.headline: Dominican Republic Immersive Dome in Times Square for cultural celebration, drew crowd of 500.
news.summary: On December 8, 2024, in New York City, the Dominican Republic commenced a seven-day festivity highlighting its rich culture and tourism by unveiling an Immersive Dome at Times Square. Approximately 500 attendees gathered for the grand opening ceremony, which marked the beginning of the event.

news.headline: Moberg Pharma AB reports disappointing results in Phase 3 study of MOB-015 in North America; will regain EU rights.
news.summary: In Stockholm on December 10, 2024, Moberg Pharma AB (OMX: MOB) revealed that their product MOB-015 (topical terbinafine) fell short of the primary goal in a phase 3 trial that involved 8 weeks of daily treatment followed by weekly maintenance doses. Following this outcome, Moberg Pharma AB will shift its attention to other areas.

news.headline: SecureAuth has acquired SessionGuardian to improve protection of sensitive data in remote settings, enhancing identity assurance.
news.summary: SecureAuth, based in Irvine, California, announced on December 10, 2024, that they have incorporated a new technology into their range of identity and access management solutions. This addition aims to protect against unauthorized access to critical data for the entire duration of a user's session. SecureAuth is known for providing identity solutions for workforce and customers, ensuring security for organizations.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Yellen: I am sorry we didn't make more progress on fiscal front.
US Treasury Secretary Yellen: I am concerned about fiscal responsibility, deficits need to be brought down.
Gables Residential named #1 Best Place to Work in Multifamily, highlighted for large management/owners category (20k+ units).
news.summary: Gables Residential, a prominent company in multifamily development, ownership, and management, has achieved the top spot nationally in the Best Places to Work Multifamily® program. They secured the first position in the large management/owners category, specifically for companies with 20,000 or more units. This accolade, presented by Multifamily Leadership, underscores Gables' dedication to fostering a remarkable workplace environment focused on boosting employee engagement and fostering innovation.

news.headline: Nippon Steel offers closing bonus for U. S. Steel Employees, showing commitment to share success. Tokyo, Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In a display of dedication to sharing the achievements of U.S. Steel with its workers, Nippon Steel Corporation ("Nippon Steel") revealed their pledge on Dec. 10, 2024, to recognize and reward employees of United States Steel Corporation ("U. S. Steel"). Nippon Steel Corporation's stock is traded on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol 5401.

news.headline: Permian Basin Water in Energy Conference will return in 2025 in Midland, Texas on March 4-6 focusing on water challenges in energy.
news.summary: Sign up now for the 2025 Permian Basin Water in Energy Conference from March 4-6, 2025, in Midland, Texas. The event will focus on addressing water challenges within the energy industry. For more information and registration, visit the website www.waterinenergy.com.

news.headline: Veeva Systems unveils latest release of Vault CRM Suite connecting sales, marketing, and medical with Version 24.4.
news.summary: Veeva Systems, based in Pleasanton, California, recently unveiled the latest version of its Vault CRM Suite on December 10, 2024. This software seamlessly integrates engagement activities across sales, marketing, and medical sectors for life sciences companies. As a notable player in the field, Veeva Systems trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol VEEV. The updated Vault CRM Suite is set to further enhance customer relationship management and drive efficiency within this sector.

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group advises Technology Service Providers to seize new opportunities in Cybersecurity Insurance industry.
news.summary: A recent blueprint by Info-Tech Research Group offers practical guidance for Technology Service Providers (TSPs) looking to establish themselves as reliable partners in the cyber insurance sector. The blueprint outlines strategies for TSPs to bridge service gaps and enhance operational efficiency within the cyber insurance market. This initiative aims to bolster trust and collaboration within the industry, ultimately benefiting all stakeholders involved.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Yellen: Broad Trump tariffs could derail progress on inflation and raise costs.
Aqua PA & OH collaborating with Energy Innovation Center for workforce and community development; $4.9M grant received.
news.summary: Aqua Pennsylvania and Aqua Ohio have revealed their involvement in a program aimed at enhancing the communities they operate in Pennsylvania and Ohio. This initiative entails a unique training partnership with the Energy Innovation Center Institute (EICI) and Infrastructure Academy. The EPA’s Innovative Water Infrastructure Workforce Development Program has allocated a substantial $4.9 million grant for the implementation of this program, benefiting not only Aqua but also numerous other municipal utility providers and training organizations.

news.headline: BLS has removed outside contractors from critical roles in data dissemination.
AANA partners with ALL IN for Healthcare to enhance mental health support in the industry.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Rosemont, Illinois, the American Association of Nurse Anesthesiology (AANA) partnered with ALL IN: Wellbeing First for Healthcare (ALL IN) to enhance mental health in the healthcare sector. AANA stands as a coalition member in this innovative program focused on boosting overall well-being.

news.headline: Inventor from Deland, Fla., creates P.E.D. CONDOM with visual indicator for STIs. Raises awareness to reduce spread.
news.summary: A new condom featuring a visual indicator for sexually transmitted infections has been developed by an inventor from Deland, Fla. Named the P.E.D. CONDOM, this innovative design aims to raise awareness and potentially curb the spread of STDs. The inventor expressed the motivation behind the creation, highlighting the need for preventive measures. This development could play a crucial role in promoting safer sexual practices and health education.

news.headline: Global public cloud services market to grow by USD 1.37 billion from 2024-2028, with 59% growth from North America and AI driving transformation.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, a report was released discussing the influence of artificial intelligence on market trends. According to Technavio, the global public cloud services market is projected to increase by approximately USD 1.37 billion between 2024 and 2028. During this period, the market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 22.7%.

news.headline: XRP drops below $2 after reaching $2.82 high. Bitcoin and other assets also fall in the market.
news.summary: XRP, after reaching a seven-year high of $2.82, experienced a significant drop one week later following a broader market decline where Bitcoin and other assets also saw decreases on Tuesday.

news.headline: Principle Health Systems buys Telos PGX to boost personalized healthcare. Acquisition announced in Addison, Texas on Dec 9, 2024.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Addison, Texas, Principle Health Systems, a top mobile diagnostic provider for long-term care, revealed its acquisition of Telos PGX, a trailblazer in pharmacogenetic testing. This acquisition marks a significant development for both companies and is set to enhance their operations in this sector.

news.headline: Shooting at UnitedHealth event disrupts Evercore Health-Care Conference.
Exiger named in Fast Company's 2024 Brands That Matter list for achieving cultural significance and customer connections.
news.summary: Exiger, a prominent AI company specializing in supply chain and third-party risk management, was recently named to Fast Company's prestigious 2024 Brands That Matter list. This annual award recognizes companies that have successfully achieved cultural significance and established strong connections with their customers. The announcement was made on December 10, 2024, highlighting Exiger's notable performance in the industry. This recognition underscores the company's commitment to innovation and its impact on the market.

news.headline: LG highlights endangered Red Wolf through 3D display in Times Square ad, aiming to raise awareness.
news.summary: A captivating 3D display featuring the critically endangered red wolf species is being showcased on a Times Square billboard in Englewood Cliffs, NJ. LG Electronics is behind this initiative, aiming to raise awareness about the red wolf's endangered status. This dynamic exhibition is set to run until Dec. 10, 2024, drawing attention to the cause on a grand scale. LG's efforts to spotlight the red wolf's plight on the iconic Times Square platform highlight the importance of conservation efforts for this at-risk species.
